package.name: visionpilot_carla_bridge
package.description: Bridge between VisionPilot's middleware-agnostic Float64 actuation contract (/vehicle/steering_cmd, /vehicle/throttle_cmd, /vehicle/speed) and CARLA's native --ros2 interface (carla_msgs/CarlaEgoVehicleControl). Lets the camera-only VisionPilot loop drive the CARLA ego (0.9.16 and 0.10).
